## Other
- Pine market has bottomed out. can't sell it. lot of talk about exporting.
- Clarke, WRTC, joint venture with Jennifer Alger and Farwest wood products they're developing. Aggregation marketing for forest based outputs and small mills. CA wood supply group similar t Sust NW Wood. Website is operational. In Martin's newsletter last week, Callifornia Wood group.
- Water DB. Give to Blue Forest (working with them on an FRB in Trinity). Beneficiary id is analog. Speak to Jason about it more. Connect as an automation in Planscape?
